申請人必須:
(a) 持有本港大學頒授的資訊科技學士學位，或同等學歷[註2];
(b) 在綜合招聘考試的能力傾向測試取得及格成績[註 3 及 4];以及
(c) 符合語文能力的要求，即在綜合招聘考試的英文運用試卷中取得「二級」成績，以及中
文運用試卷中取得「一級」成績，或具備同等成績[註 3 及 4]。

replies.msg: 無講幾多

my friend Ken works as an accounting manager at hilton but if he takes the job in big 4 he will be four thousand dollars a month better off but he's still better off now than he was two years ago when he was working below everybody else in the department. He thinks a junior accountant position is beneath him. If he hadn't taken the CPA exam two years ago he wouldn't be working as a manager now. He's a science fiction fan. He said "if scientists really would invent a starship I would leave my job and spend the rest of my life roaming the universe." Recently his sister married her childhood sweetheart. Her father felt she was marrying beneath her though. Her uncle feels her husband is best her too. She enjoys socializing with the better off. Three months ago ken was away on a business trip to hokkaido. After the trip I said "if you should go there again can you get me this pack of chocolate please?" Ken is a computer expert. His cousin has to wrote a report which is due on Tuesday but she's having problems with her computer. If ken would go and fix her computer she will be so thankful for his help. She also has exams next monday so she's better off revising at home this weekend. Ken is a kickboxing fan. His favourite fighter Dan won his retirement fight just the other weekly. He's deeply grateful to his coaches and thankful that he got a job as a colour commentator after he retired from the sport. All the fans want to see Fred versus randy. If Fred will sign a deal with the organisation Dana will make the match happen. His brother works as a concierge at a hotel. I said "if it'll make you happy I'll come to stay for a night as company for you while your colleagues are away" Ken's friend Ed gave a house party last week. His television is cheap and nasty. As many of us wanted to watch the news I said "if I could turn the TV on please" He then said "sure. If you would switch to the news channel" I saw Joey live twice. The first time I saw her concert we were late. I remember I said "look at the time. The concert will have started." It was quarter to nine. The concert would've started by then. By next century scientists will have invented a starship. As I'm very interested in the science of starships I'm gonna ask professor chan about them. I'm going to wait outside the lecture hall at six. He'll have finished his lecture.

quote.msg:
其實都算低人工，inhouse 有番啲資歷要高過呢個價唔難

做vendor公司俾公司壓榨既先低過呢個價
你所指嘅in-house, 做夠19年可以達AP1 max 73k?

replies.msg:
三年上acting API, 第四年坐正 point 28 ($58k)
有omitted point，第八年上 point 33, $73K
但每年加人工，point 33 八年後應該 $8XK.

MPF 15%, 每個月再多$12000。即係九皮幾野，再拎埋housing，差唔多十皮。老實講唔係咁多人喺私人市場搵到。

仲未計唔會俾人炒，如果你後生入職，去到呢個位都只係三十頭。退休前仲有三十年玩，基本實上升多一兩級。

quote.msg:
(a) copies of degree certificates;
(b) copies of official transcripts; and
(c) copies of transcripts of studies / academic results (if applicants are going to obtain the requisite academic
qualification stated in the “Entry Requirements” [Item (a)] above within the 2019/20 academic year).

係咪冇交紅字

其實唔計mpf八年後已接近九皮(當每年加2.5%）
$73k * (1.025)^8 = $89k
未計housing同mpf.

講真如果喺私人公司搵到嘅，唔做ap唔出奇。
但呢個人工出面做大project pm都未必有，仲要俾人屌到化同隨時炒。

你話而家十年經驗左右嘅IT狗有幾多隻穩逗到7-8雞一個月？做SA四雞幾係正常，但唔係咁易再上，除非升pm
